content: A 2025 meta-learning memory consolidation agent can be repurposed as a recursive self-improving base agent that selectively consolidates only high-value exploratory memory traces from curiosity-driven reinforcement learning runs, eliminating catastrophic forgetting of rare, surprising exploration outcomes that current curious agents routinely discard. This creates a self-amplifying loop where better consolidated exploratory memories enable more informed meta-learning of new environment priors, which in turn generate more targeted curious exploration.
